title: White Satin Ribbon, 38mm x 22M Single Face White Ribbon, Solid Color Satin Ribbon Perfect for Gift Wrapping, Crafts, Bow Making, Sewing and Wedding Decorations
features: Packing & Size: This 38mm(1-1/2 inch) wide, 22 Metres(25 yards) white ribbon features a smooth, glossy finish that exudes luxury; Perfect for gift wrapping, hair accessories, and floral arrangements, its vibrant red color adds a touch of elegance to any project

Premium Material: Our white satin ribbon is crafted from premium 100% polyester satin fabric, known for its exceptional durability, smooth texture, and vibrant color; The high-quality polyester satin material ensures that the ribbon is wrinkle-free, easy to handle, and maintains its luster even after repeated use. This ribbon is designed to be tear-resistant and colorfast, making it ideal for a wide range of crafting applications

Ribbons for Crafts: This satin ribbon is perfect for adding a touch of elegance to your creative projects. Use it to embellish handmade greeting cards, creating beautiful bows or intricate designs that make your cards stand out. For floral arrangements, the ribbon is ideal for tying flower bouquets, enhancing the beauty of fresh or dried flowers. When it comes to gift wrapping, this vibrant ribbon adds a luxurious finish to your presents, making them look extra special for any occasion

Easy to Use: The ribbon is flexible and can be easily folded, making it perfect for tying gifts. By cutting the ribbon to the correct length and shape, you can create exquisite ribbon bows or other decorative elements, adding a personalized touch and an elegant flair to your gifts

Wide Application: Use this craft ribbon is incredibly versatile, making it perfect for creating beautiful ribbon flowers and decorations for holidays such as Thanksgiving, Christmas, Valentine's Day, Father's Day, and Mother's Day. It is also ideal for enhancing wedding invitations, gift wrapping, and crafting stylish hair bows. Whether you need it for special occasions or everyday crafting, this ribbon adds a touch of elegance and creativity to all your projects
